name: AGENTS.md as a map, not an encyclopedia
known_limits: Coverage depends on deeper docs and skills staying discoverable and current.

name: Feature-gap research before implementation planning
known_limits: Works only when agents ground gaps in real comparables rather than intuition.

name: External parity research before local scoping
known_limits: Research method separation must stay intact so parity does not import every adjacent feature into local scope.

name: Best-of-worlds synthesis
known_limits: External skills and repos are research inputs, not live dependencies or auto-synced behavior.

name: Metric-driven autoresearch sessions
known_limits: Skill-and-script based; not a hosted dashboard or always-on benchmark lab.

name: Skill self-improvement with binary evals
known_limits: Durable skill memory is only for reusable evals and lessons; scratch runs stay in experiments.

name: Ticket as durable task memory
known_limits: Only works when agents write progress, blockers, and evidence back to the ticket.

name: Artifact-first QA and completion proof
known_limits: Depends on linked artifacts and reviewer gates, not ticket-body proof theater.

name: Serial Ralph board draining
known_limits: Serial only; no leases, worktrees, merge queue, or batch QA orchestration yet.

name: Stop-hook continuation and completion judgment
known_limits: Completion authority depends on visible review receipts and active ticket-backed impl loops.

name: Harness scout source ingestion
known_limits: Manual scorecard and dedupe workflow only; no cron polling, OpenClaw integration, or async Codex benchmark runner.

name: Gated skill opportunity applier
known_limits: Hook sidecar defaults to dry-run probes for local verification; live Notion task creation still depends on Codex CLI tool availability and Notion access. Benchmark-driven rollback and automatic quality comparison remain follow-up work.

name: Hook-based error learning reminder comparison
known_limits: Benchmark-only until useful captures beat false reminders and context noise on representative fixtures.

name: Frontend skill parity upgrade
known_limits: Docs/skill-contract upgrade only; no automated eval suite or searchable frontend rule corpus yet.

name: Symphony-compatible Farplane invocation contract
known_limits: Filesystem ticket adapter and local compute only; no daemon, polling, Linear/Notion adapter, cloud execution, or Codex-launching wrapper.

name: Board and compute orchestration doctrine
known_limits: Spec/governance layer only; BoardAdapter v1, compute selector v2, Symphony shim, and parallel Ralph remain follow-up tickets.

name: Symphony-style spec authoring contract
known_limits: Governance/template only; it should guide complex specs without forcing service-runtime ceremony into PRDs or small tickets.

name: Filesystem BoardAdapter v1
known_limits: Filesystem read/normalization only; evidence writeback is explicit manual result and external board adapters remain future work.

name: Compute selector admission policy v2
known_limits: Admission only; it does not launch worktrees, Symphony, Codex cloud, retries, polling, or remote scheduler work.

name: Symphony integration shim template
known_limits: Template and smoke only; no Elixir service, Linear API integration, Codex app-server client, scheduler, retry loop, or remote worker launch ships here.

name: Parallel Ralph design contract
known_limits: Design only; serial Ralph remains the only shipped dispatcher until lease registry, worktree lanes, proof collector, integration lane, and batch QA tickets are implemented.

name: Tiered skill dependency loading
known_limits: Depends on skill maintainers keeping Markdown links accurate; Tier 2 is an interface layer, so concrete coding skills such as spec-to-ticket, impl-plan, impl, and close-ticket must not be treated as universal generic workflows.

name: Harness improvement placement advisor
known_limits: Advisory workflow only; it recommends the owning surface and validation path but does not mutate hooks, agents, skills, or registries by itself. Placement scoring is judgment-guided rather than mechanically enforced.

name: Skill capability sanity tests
known_limits: Capability fixtures, repair-ticket generation, and value-signal scoring exist; generated skill registry rows do not yet expose compact capability handles. Installed or external skills can be mirrored by fixtures, but self-healing must target local wrappers, registry/test metadata, or visible repair tickets unless the operator explicitly approves a specific external-skill edit.

name: Video-to-skill source reconstruction
known_limits: Support-skill and artifact contract only; platform fetching still depends on available local tools, public access, or user-provided exports, and transcript gaps must be recorded rather than hidden.

name: Case-based memory context graph
known_limits: Seed design only; no extractor, generated graph, query helper, or review integration exists yet.

name: Profile-driven project planning
known_limits: Planning-skill guidance and profile/lifecycle references only; no deterministic validator enforces profile quality, and prototype gates remain judgment-driven rather than automatic ticket generation.

name: First-principles planning contract
known_limits: Planning/spec/advice contract only; it improves PRD, ticket, plan, and recommendation shape but does not mechanically prove that first-principles reasoning is correct.

name: Goal crafting for native Codex goals
known_limits: Skill-only preparation surface; native Codex Goal mode owns lifecycle, continuation, budget, and evidence-based completion behavior.

name: On-demand skill plugin packaging
known_limits: Generated plugin packages are no longer tracked in source. Farplane keeps `skills/*` as the source of truth; `bin/sync_skill_plugins.py` can generate ignored repo-local packages or install selected bundles into a personal Codex marketplace under `~/.agents/plugins` and `~/.codex/plugins/farplane`. Official self-serve public Plugin Directory publishing, icons, screenshots, apps, MCP servers, and hooks are not included yet.

name: Agent behavior test workflow
known_limits: CLI JSONL runs capture visible messages, command events, final output, and usage, but not hidden chain-of-thought. Native subagent testing still depends on the subagent writing its own report artifact.

name: Goal-backed Work Admission
known_limits: Skill and docs contract only; it does not implement a daemon, true parallel Ralph, Codex Cloud launcher, Symphony runner, or nested Goal manager.

name: Embedded skill checklist install
known_limits: Rendered installed skills must be refreshed by rerunning install after source skill edits; the renderer improves first-load checklist visibility but does not persist checklist state or inspect hidden reasoning.

name: Adversarial agent QA test skill
known_limits: Skill and prompt-template surface only; actual native subagent execution still depends on the invoking agent and available runtime tools.

name: Entity-linked harness resource tracking
known_limits: Model and seed config only; no dedicated validator script, GitHub polling helper, X API/Apify boundary, or content ledger integration is shipped yet.

name: Explicit PR review watcher workflow
known_limits: GitHub/gh-oriented first slice with fixture-first proof; no hidden daemon, cloud scheduler, automatic push/merge/deploy, or broad multi-provider live integration matrix.

name: Sample-first prototyping primitive
known_limits: Judgment-driven skill primitive only; it records and requires representative Prototype Notes but does not automatically detect every over-scaled command or enforce sampling at shell runtime.

name: Adaptive backoff operating policy
known_limits: Policy and skill guidance only; deterministic script adoption remains per-caller and this feature must not become a hidden daemon, queue, scheduler, or automatic retry loop.

name: Repent lesson, hardcase, and narrow eval capture
known_limits: Capture is human-marked or validator-seeded. It may add narrow high-priority regression eval rows, but it does not drain lessons into broad skill edits, generate broad eval suites, train models, sell data, or inspect full Codex histories without a seed anchor. Notion proposal creation depends on private handles and available tools.

name: Meta-harness automation map
known_limits: Documentation and registry-routing layer only; skill template onboarding is optional and reported from generated registry metadata. Skill feature adoption is not yet a generated per-skill field, and Farplane does not run hidden skill-health daemons or background schedulers.

name: Filesystem lifecycle and drain routing
known_limits: Router contract only; owner docs still define detailed local rules and agents must not treat experiments as canonical memory.

name: Lean global agent operating kernel
known_limits: The global template now owns only every-turn behavior; project-specific coding defaults and detailed workflows must keep living in project AGENTS files, skills, tickets, docs, validators, or subagent prompts.

name: Project-level system prompt eval suite
known_limits: The current runner judges final answers and task artifacts, not full hidden reasoning or complete live tool-event traces. Behavior claims that need child-agent command logs should use agent-behavior-test or agent-qa-test.

name: Validator-triggered hardcase capture
known_limits: The validator writes deduplicated hardcase artifacts only when todo-tier checks fail. It does not fix the violation or create runnable eval rows by itself.

name: Whole-thread topic ledger and split discipline
known_limits: The behavior is prompt-and-eval enforced rather than mechanically checked in every chat response; it should trigger for long or multitopic substantial replies, not every tiny answer. Independent or context-heavy tangents still need the agent to propose an explicit new-thread handoff rather than silently continuing in one overloaded chat.

name: Goal algebra with HITL and agent QA composition
known_limits: Skill-contract composition only. Native Goal mode owns continuation; HITL feedback still requires a human-authored feedback file or configured notification path, and agent QA execution depends on available subagent/runtime tools.

name: Deliberative advice council workflow
known_limits: Skill-contract workflow only; actual independent perspective collection depends on the invoking agent and available native subagent or lane tooling. It is not a hidden daemon, majority-vote system, or automatic multi-model router.

name: Harness algebra function contracts
known_limits: Canonical model and template guidance only; no broad skill migration, generated graph extraction from function contracts, semantic validator, or automatic optimization loop is shipped yet.
